prompt: Set up release-please for my Node.js project. It's a library published to npm, currently at version 2.1.0, single package, main branch. No pre-releases needed.

assertions.name: has_concurrency
assertions.description: Workflow includes concurrency group with cancel-in-progress: false

assertions.name: publish_gated
assertions.description: Publish job is gated on release_created == true

assertions.name: npm_publish
assertions.description: Workflow includes npm publish step with NPM_TOKEN
